hero.title: Agentic engineering for enterprise modernization
hero.summary: A governed, platform-enabled, human-and-agent operating model for modernizing, delivering, operating, and continuously evolving software systems at enterprise scale.

proofPoints: Combines DDD, event storming, modernization patterns, and agent-enabled engineering into one model
Treats governance, enablement, and platform design as first-class concerns
Designed to support both delivery and capability transfer to client teams

sectionIntros.operatingModel: The operating model ties together lifecycle phases, cross-cutting pillars, human roles, agent roles, and enterprise foundations.
sectionIntros.pillars: The pillars define the cross-cutting capabilities needed to govern, enable, and scale agentic engineering.
sectionIntros.lifecycle: The lifecycle shows how modernization work moves from direction setting through managed evolution.
sectionIntros.offerings: Offerings translate the operating model into sellable work packages and delivery motions.
sectionIntros.useCases: Use cases make the model concrete for modernization, platform engineering, and operational transformation.
